reply:
[[BLOCK:slide13_shape1]]
Introduced by Friedman (2008)  
Comparable to abduction or Inference to the Best Explanation (IBE): avoid settling on a single solution; consider multiple possibilities.  
There may be numerous ways to address the problem. Why not investigate various approaches?  
Begin with no modeling or a zero-coefficient model.  
Experiment with a range of models. The solution is flexible and adaptable.  
Select the optimal model based on the algorithm's evaluation, not personal judgment!
